text: Tank level measurement of free water by gauging tape and plumb bob: find the labeling combination that is correct,

options.text: 1 Water Innage; 2-Water Cut; 3- Water Cut; 4- Water Ullage
1- Water Cut; 2- Water Innage; 3- Water Cut; 4- Water Ullage
1- Water Cut; 2- Water Innage; 3- Water Ullage; 4- Water Cut
1- Water Cut; 2- Water Cut; 3- Water Innage; 4- Water Ullage

explanation: Gauging terminology distinguishes between 'innage' (the depth of liquid) and 'cut' (the depth of a specific component like water at the bottom). Correct labeling of water cut and innage is essential for accurate cargo volume determination.
